overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban downtown at dusk. The scene transitions from a covered commercial street beneath neon-lit billboards to an open waterfront boulevard with palm trees and futuristic vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street under overpass with neon billboards

events.description: NCPD officer in tactical gear walks past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking the view
character walks across yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt through a covered urban corridor beneath large corporate billboards

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in tactical gear with 'NCPD' marked on back walking past camera
pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt and red hair walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'NICOLA' with beverage advertisement mounted on overpass
corporate billboard for Delamain positioned next to Nicola sign
massive concrete overpass covering the street with hanging digital displays and structural beams
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive concrete overpass in Night City, dominated by large illuminated billboards for Nicola and Delamain. An NCPD officer passes by in the foreground as the character walks across a marked crosswalk, following a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional covered walkway with overhead advertisements approaching open sky

events.description: lighting transitions from artificial neon to mixed natural and artificial as approaching the open street exit
exiting the deep covered area of the overpass into the transitional zone where sky becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing beneath large overhead billboards while approaching the open street

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying '3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' with Sasha Devon advertisement spanning the overpass
tall modern street lamp with horizontal LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the overpass, the character passes beneath massive digital billboards advertising '3MOUTHS 1 DESIRE' as the environment transitions from fully covered to partially open. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to a mix of natural dusk and artificial illumination as the street exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront boulevard with palm trees and parking structures

events.description: emerging from underpass into natural dusk light with clear sky visible overhead
fully exiting covered area into open urban street with visible palm trees and distant buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk as the environment opens up to reveal palm trees, parking structures, and the El Guapo billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing undercarriage driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'softsys' mounted on the building facade
large billboard for 'EL GUAPO' with circular logo mounted on multi-story parking garage
tall palm trees lining the distant street against the dusk sky
multi-story concrete parking structure with horizontal levels and open sides

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered overpass into the open air of a waterfront boulevard at dusk. The El Guapo billboard dominates the right side mounted on a parking garage, while palm trees line the distant street. A green neon 'softsys' sign glows on the left building as futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane urban thoroughfare with commercial buildings and traffic bollards

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles pass by including a distinctive green sports car with glowing accents

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront sidewalk approaching an intersection, with moderate traffic flowing on the right

entered.detail: tall building covered with multiple illuminated advertisements and vertical neon signs
short yellow posts lining the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along the open urban thoroughfare with the El Guapo billboard now in the distance. The left side features a tall commercial building covered in illuminated advertisements, while yellow traffic bollards line the sidewalk edge. Futuristic vehicles with glowing undercarriages drive past on the multi-lane road as the character approaches an intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban corridor into an expansive waterfront boulevard at dusk. It begins under a massive concrete overpass dominated by illuminated Nicola and Delamain billboards, following a pedestrian across a marked crosswalk as an NCPD officer passes by. As the character moves deeper through the corridor beneath digital advertisements, the environment gradually transitions from a fully covered space to a partially open exit where artificial neon begins to blend with the natural light of twilight. The scene then opens into the fresh air of a waterfront boulevard, passing a glowing softsys sign and the towering El Guapo billboard while palm trees and futuristic vehicles appear on the wet pavement. Finally, the camera advances along the open thoroughfare past yellow traffic bollards and tall commercial buildings, moving toward an intersection as vehicles with glowing undercarriages stream across the multi-lane road.
